CHAR 1 x x x x x
M1032_HOSP_RISK_RCNT_DCLN M1032 Risk for Hosp- Decline in Mental, Emotional, Behavioral This field is checked if the patient is at risk for hospitalization due to recent decline in mental, emotional, or behavioral status. 0 = Not Checked, 1 = Checked CHAR 1 x
M1032_HOSP_RISK_FRAILTY M1032 Risk for Hosp- Frailty Indicators This field is checked if the patient is at risk for hospitalization due to frailty indicators. 0 = Not Checked, 1 = Checked CHAR 1
